codeReview.summary: The project CRUD API implementation is complete and well-structured. All required endpoints (POST, GET list, GET single, PATCH, DELETE) are implemented with proper Zod validation, error handling, and timestamp management. The cascade delete functionality correctly removes associated tasks and approval_requests. Code follows the established project conventions with proper TypeScript typing.

issues.description: The 'should update updated_at timestamp' test has a race condition. It uses a 1.1 second delay with setTimeout, but Bun's test runner runs tests in parallel by default. The beforeEach cleanup can run during this delay, causing the test to fail with 404. Consider using sequential test execution or restructuring the test to avoid timing-dependent assertions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker correctly followed AGENTS.md conventions for route structure (src/api/routes/), validation schemas (src/schemas/), and error response format ({ error: string, details?: any }).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/api/routes/projects.ts uses consistent error handling patterns matching AGENTS.md guidelines.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The API service configuration in services.yaml correctly documents port 3200 and healthcheck endpoint.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml shows api service on port 3200 with healthcheck: curl -sf http://localhost:3200/api/health

sharedStateObservations.observation: The cascade delete behavior is correctly implemented at the database schema level with Drizzle ORM's onDelete: 'cascade' configuration.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/db/schema.ts shows tasks.projectId has references(() => projects.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }) and approvalRequests.taskId has similar cascade configuration.

summary: The project-crud-api feature is fully implemented and meets all expected behaviors. The implementation includes: POST /api/projects (201 with created project, 400 for missing name), GET /api/projects (array of projects), GET /api/projects/:id (project or 404), PATCH /api/projects/:id (updates only provided fields with new updated_at), DELETE /api/projects/:id (204 with cascade delete of tasks and approval_requests). All endpoints have Zod validation and proper error handling. One non-blocking test flake was identified related to parallel test execution timing.
